query:
-- Create placeholder services for the 3 ceased MSISDNs with no octane_customer_links
-- They belong to AHJ Pty Ltd (C0326) as the master Zambrero account
INSERT INTO services (externalId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, supplierName, 
                      customerExternalId, customerName, phoneNumber, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue,
                      status, billingPlatform, discoveryNotes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('S7425', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0326', 'AHJ Pty Ltd (Zambrero)', '0493803414', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased, no site assignment found', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7426', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0326', 'AHJ Pty Ltd (Zambrero)', '0493834499', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased, no site assignment found', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7427', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0326', 'AHJ Pty Ltd (Zambrero)', '0493834657', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased, no site assignment found', NOW(), NOW());

-- Update tiab_services to link to the new services
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN services s ON s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn AND ts.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
SET ts.internalServiceExternalId = s.externalId,
    ts.reconStatus = 'matched'
WHERE ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched';

-- Final check
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_tiab_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND internalServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked_to_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'customer_matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as still_customer_matched_only
FROM tiab_services;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Create placeholder services for the 3 ceased MSISDNs with no octane_customer_links
-- They belong to AHJ Pty Ltd (C0326) as the master Zambrero account
INSERT INTO services (externalId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, supplierName, 
                      customerExternalId, customerName, phoneNumber, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue,
                      status, billingPlatform, discoveryNotes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('S7425', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0326', 'AHJ Pty Ltd (Zambrero)', '0493803414', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased, no site assignment found', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7426', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0326', 'AHJ Pty Ltd (Zambrero)', '0493834499', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased, no site assignment found', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7427', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0326', 'AHJ Pty Ltd (Zambrero)', '0493834657', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased, no site assignment found', NOW(), NOW());

-- Update tiab_services to link to the new services
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN services s ON s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn AND ts.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
SET ts.internalServiceExternalId = s.externalId,
    ts.reconStatus = 'matched'
WHERE ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched';

-- Final check
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_tiab_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND internalServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked_to_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'customer_matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as still_customer_matched_only
FROM tiab_services;
